claim_text: After PR #14407 (backport of #14382 to the 9.0.x branch), pytest's CLI accepts the `-V` short-flag as equivalent to `--version`: both produce the version string `pytest <X.Y.Z>` via the early fast-path in `_pytest/config/__init__.py:main()`, without loading the rest of the pytest infrastructure. Prior to this change `-V` was not in the early-version fast-path counter, so it would either error or trigger full plugin loading depending on the calling context. Provenance note: this PR is a 9.0.x backport — the original fix was authored by a community contributor in PR #14382 against main, then cherry-picked by maintainers; the diff is materially identical (changelog entry + src counter update + test parametrization).
title: [PR #14382/d72943a5 backport][9.0.x] Fix `-V` to show version information
